message:
🌱 Add fluentd: JSON parser plugin can sometimes output records as strings mission (#1765)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "fluentd-4100-json-parser-plugin-can-sometimes-output-records-as-strings-rather-t",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "fluentd: JSON parser plugin can sometimes output records as strings rather than `Hash`",
+    "description": "JSON parser plugin can sometimes output records as strings rather than `Hash`. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify fluentd troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your fluentd deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd -n fluentd --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for error: `\"undefined method `map' for #<String:0x00007fdbb6b32308>\\nDid you mean?  tap\" location=\"/usr/local/bundle/gems/fluent-pl`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review fluentd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant fluentd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd\nkubectl get configmap -n fluentd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluentd\n```\n### Describe the bug\n\nThe JSON parser plugin can sometimes emit records as a string rather than as a `Hash`."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for JSON parser plugin can sometimes output records as strings…",
+        "description": "Sorry for the delay!\n\nThis is not only an issue for `filter_parser`, but for all plugins that can use `parser_json`.\n\nSo we should fix `parser_json`.\n\nhttps://github.com/fluent/fluentd/blob/d5df992d844af38233c4d3788de714d644ddb6c4/lib/fluent/plugin/parser_json.rb#L72-L81\n\nThis should return `nil` when the parsed result is not a `Hash`.\n\nThe root cause of this is that sometimes the Ruby library does not parse a given string as `Hash`.\n\n```rb\nrequire \"json\"\nJSON.load('\"hoge\"')\n=> \"hoge\"\n```\n\nI\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm JSON parser plugin can sometimes output records… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluentd -n fluentd --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n fluentd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that `\"undefined method `map' for #<String:0x00007fdbb6b32308>\\nDid you mean?  tap\" location=\"/usr/local/bundle/gems/fluent-pl` no longer appears in logs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Sorry for the delay!\n\nThis is not only an issue for `filter_parser`, but for all plugins that can use `parser_json`.\n\nSo we should fix `parser_json`.\n\nhttps://github.com/fluent/fluentd/blob/d5df992d844af38233c4d3788de714d644ddb6c4/lib/fluent/plugin/parser_json.rb#L72-L81\n\nThis should return `nil` when the parsed result is not a `Hash`.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "fluentd",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "fluentd"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Configmap"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/fluent/fluentd/issues/4100",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/fluent/fluentd"
+    },
+    "reactions": 3,
+    "comments": 18,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with fluentd installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-26T06:32:46.732Z",
